name: standard-schema-faker-bench
description: Standalone benchmark harness (not a workspace member) comparing standard-schema-faker against @anatine/zod-mock. Isolated because @anatine/zod-mock requires zod v3, incompatible with this repo's zod v4.

scripts.pack-tarballs: mkdir -p tarballs && (cd .. && pnpm build && pnpm pack --pack-destination ./bench/tarballs) && mv tarballs/standard-schema-faker-*.tgz tarballs/standard-schema-faker.tgz
scripts.bench:cold: node cold-dumb.mjs && node cold-faker.mjs && node cold-zodmock.mjs
